content: react-markdown v10 (latest 10.1.0): ESM-only, safe by default — no dangerouslySetInnerHTML, raw HTML in markdown is escaped/ignored unless rehype-raw is added. Props: children (md string), remarkPlugins (e.g. remark-gfm for tables/task lists), components (tag->React component map). ~60kb minzipped ceiling with rehype-raw; smaller without. Compatible with React 18.
